transcript: Speaker A: I came here to have tea. Speaker B: Nenu ikkada tea tagataniki vachanu. [I came here to have tea.] Speaker A: I came here to have tea. Speaker B: Ee tea chala vediga undi. [This tea is very hot.] Speaker A: This tea is very hot. Speaker B: Ee tea naku chala tasty ga anipistundi. [I really like the taste of this tea.] Speaker A: I really like the taste of this tea. Speaker C: Bro, nuvvu ekkada English nerchukuntunnav? [Bro, where are you learning English from?] Speaker B: SpeakX App lo, AI teacher tho. [In SpeakX App, with AI teacher.] Speaker C: Naaku ardham kaaledu. [I didn't understand.] Speaker B: Idi oka app, ikkada AI teacher duara priti roju English practice cheyyachu nuvvu. Neeku telusu kada, English lekunda respect kuda raadhu, job kuda kastam. Anduke SpeakX app lo roju ki 10 to 15 minutes Practice chestunnanu. Ippatiki 10 days ayyayi, and that's why I can speak English so confidently without any fear. [This is an app, here you can practice English every day with an AI teacher. You know, right, without English there is no respect, and getting a job is also difficult. That's why I practice 10 to 15 minutes daily on the SpeakX app. It's been 10 days now, and that's why I can speak English so confidently without any fear.] Speaker C: Naaku kuda English nerchukovalani undi, kani courses chala costly kada. [I also want to learn English, but courses are very costly, right?] Speaker B: Ee app chala cheap-u, rojuki only 4 rupees, and also 7 days ki free trial kuda istharu veellu. [This app is very cheap, only 4 rupees a day, and they also give a 7-day free trial.] Speaker C: Arey wah! okka nimisham, SpeakX app nenu kuda ippude download chestanu. [Oh wow! Just a minute, I will also download the SpeakX app right now.]
on_screen_text: Nenu ikkada [I am here] / tea tagataniki vachanu [came to drink tea] / I came here to have tea. / Ee tea chala [This tea is very] / vediga undi [hot] / This tea is very hot. / Ee tea naku chala [This tea to me is very] / tasty ga anipistundi [tasty] / I really like the taste of this tea. / nuvvu ekkada English nerchukuntunnav? [where are you learning English?] / SpeakX App lo, AI teacher tho. [In SpeakX App, with AI teacher.] / Naaku ardham kaaledu [I didn't understand] / idi oka app [this is an app] / ikkada AI teacher duara priti roju cheyyachu. [here you can do it every day through AI teacher.] / Neeku telusu kada, English lekunda respect kuda raadhu [You know, right, without English even respect won't come] / Job kuda kastam [Job is also difficult] / Anduke SpeakX app lo roju ki 10 to 15 minutes Practice [That's why 10 to 15 minutes practice daily in SpeakX app] / Ippatiki 10 days ayyayi [It's been 10 days now] / I can speak English so confidently without any fear. / nerchukovalani undi, chala Costly kada. [want to learn, but very costly right.] / Ee app chala cheapu [This app is very cheap] / Rojki only 4 rupees [Only 4 rupees daily] / and also 7 days ki free trial kuda istharu. [and also they give a 7-day free trial.] / Arey wah! okka nimisham [Oh wow! One minute] / SpeakX app nenu kuda ippude download chestanu. [I will also download SpeakX app right now.]
summary: A man demonstrates how he uses the SpeakX app to practice English translation with an AI teacher. His friend is impressed by his confidence and asks about the app, but worries about high course fees. He reassures her that the app is highly affordable at just 4 rupees a day with a 7-day free trial, prompting her to download it.
